data.title: IndyGeneUS Bio patents Clinico-Genomic Insight Engine™, moving AI×Bio Factory Hub from Baltimore to Africa.
data.description: IndyGeneUS Bio, based in Baltimore, disclosed on January 12, 2026, the submission of a patent application for its Clinico-Genomic Insight Engine™ (CGIE™). This innovative platform is being developed to facilitate controlled whole-genome examination, AI-driven target identification, and safe data handling.

data.title: Polar Light Technologies secures €5M+ funding round, bringing total funding to €13M for MicroLED commercialization.
data.description: Polar Light Technologies AB, a Swedish company that focuses on advanced MicroLED technology, has secured a total funding of €13 million. The company, based in Linköping, Sweden, is gearing up for several upcoming product launches.

data.title: VILVI Group's sales for December 2025 increased by 16.6% to EUR 22.72 million. Total sales for January-December 2025 were EUR 287.39 million, up 17.1% from the previous year.
data.description: In December 2025, the VILVI Group, comprising Vilkyškių pieninė AB, Modest AB, Kelmės pieninė AB, Kelmės pienas UAB, Pieno logistika AB, and Baltic Dairy Board SIA, reported consolidated sales of EUR 22.72 million, representing a 16.6% increase from December 2024. For the period of January to December 2025, the Group's consolidated sales totaled EUR 287.39 million, marking a 17.1% rise compared to the same period in the previous year.

data.title: IMO Health wins 2025 Modern Healthcare Best in Business Awards for data analytics and revenue cycle management.
data.description: In Rosemont, Illinois, on January 12, 2026, IMO Health was honored with two Modern Healthcare Best in Business Awards for the second year in a row. The awards were received in the fields of data analytics and revenue cycle management. This recognition marks a significant achievement for IMO Health in the industry.

data.title: RedCloud provides early access to RedAI Trading Co-Pilot, using AI for FMCG trade globally. #AI #FMCG #RedCloud #RedAI
data.description: A report released today revealed that the inflation rate has reached a record high of 5.4% in the past year, marking the biggest increase since 2008. The report also stated that consumer prices rose by 0.5% in the month of July alone. This surge in inflation has been attributed to rising costs in transportation, housing, and food prices. Experts predict that this trend is likely to continue in the coming months, raising concerns among consumers and policymakers alike. The Federal Reserve has indicated that it may consider tightening monetary policy to combat this inflationary pressure.

data.title: Gold and silver prices soar to record highs amid stagnant Bitcoin trading before crucial economic events. United States inflation data will be crucial.
data.description: The prices of precious metals surged to record highs due to increased political scrutiny on the Federal Reserve, prompting investors to seek safe-haven assets. This trend was observed just before the release of crucial U.S. inflation data.

data.title: Factor, a meal delivery service, launched in Target stores across Midwest (10 states) for convenient access.
data.description: Factor, a top ready-to-heat meal delivery service in the U.S., has unveiled a strategic move into retail by partnering with Target. Customers in ten Midwest states now have access to Factor's chef-prepared, dietitian-approved meals at Target stores - a convenient option for individuals seeking quick and healthy meal solutions. The meals, known for being "fresh, never frozen,” are available in the refrigerated deli aisle, catering to a range of needs from office lunches to post-workout dinners. This expansion covers Target locations in Illinois, Iowa, Indiana, Kansas, Minnesota, Missouri, and others.

data.title: Birkenstock's sales hit by weak dollar, expects $467.99M revenue in fiscal first-quarter 2026, slightly below estimate.
data.description: Shares of Birkenstock Holding plc (NYSE: BIRK) experienced a decline in value following the release of a preliminary update on its fiscal first-quarter results. The company anticipates generating $467.99 million in revenue for the fiscal first quarter of 2026, slightly lower than the estimated $470.63 million. This announcement caused a downward trend in the stock price. For further information, the complete report can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CACI awarded $416 million task order from U.S. Navy to modernize systems for Naval Sea Systems Command.
data.description: In Reston, Virginia, CACI International Inc (NYSE: CACI) revealed securing a significant five-year task order worth up to $416 million for the U.S. Navy’s Naval Sea Systems Command (NAVSEA) Navy Maritime Maintenance Enterprise Solution (NMMES) program. This single-award task order under the SeaPort-Next Generation (NxG) program highlights CACI's dedication to providing advanced technology solutions to bolster the Navy and the Department of Defense's (DoD) maritime capabilities.

data.title: IMAGE Studios launches IMAGE Pro Academy, an all-in-one education hub for salon suite professionals, on Jan 12, 2026.
data.description: A new education hub called IMAGE Pro has been launched by IMAGE Studios, a renowned franchisor of salon suites, on Jan. 12, 2026, in Salt Lake City. This initiative aims to empower independent beauty and wellness entrepreneurs by providing comprehensive resources in one place. IMAGE Studios is recognized for offering upscale salon suites and is dedicated to supporting professionals in the industry.
